decisions.decision: NaN guard added to X/Y onChange in TitleEditor
decisions.rationale: parseInt('') = NaN → JSON.stringify(NaN) = null → corrupts config

decisions.decision: Legacy titles retain orphaned fields (topOffset, subtitleFontSize) on round-trip
decisions.rationale: handleStartEdit spreads existing style; expected behavior — pre-existing titles not migrated

decisions.decision: Server read/write config split is pre-existing
decisions.rationale: PIPELINE_CONFIG_PATH (read) vs ACTIVE_PIPELINE_CONFIG_PATH (write) — not a Phase 20 bug
